title: Urban Rangers Arcade 2
description:
working on Ubuntu versions.

"Urban Rangers Arcade 2 Rocks".

The Trailers are Outdated Working On The New Ones.

Just Finished The Launch Update......And It Is Great.

This Is The Conclusion To The Great "Urban Rangers Arcade" -

Urban Rangers Arcade-2.

The Rangers, Thought They Had BoJaNgLeS Taken Down..............

But The Nightmare Had Only Began......

Bo Is Back, And Hes Calling The Rangers By Name.

You Got His Attention......

Finish The Fight.

Drop Your Side Arm, And Pick Up That Assault Rifle...........

Things Are Escalating. 

Dont Let Your Recruits Die.....The Chances Of Making It Out Are Far Less With Out Them.

-----------------------------------------------------------------

This Game Is Complete And Functional.

Set Your Pc To '1920 x  1080' if You Experience Any Visual Issues.

Every Things Designed for 1920 x 1080 pc res.

"Urban Rangers Arcade 2"    Is A (2-D) - (3-D)  Side Scroll Beat Em Up/Shooter.

Depending On What Camera You Choose To Play. "(2-D) (3-D)"

Play Solo Or With A Friend Via Couch Co-op Same Screen Play.

Urban Rangers Arcade-2 Has Faster Combat, ("I Am Implementing In Part 1 As-well") 

And A New Shooter/Beat Em Up Style.......Compared To The First Game "More Focused On Hand To Hand"

BoJaNgLeS Is Back........

Its Time To Finish The Fight........

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The Ranger Recruits Are Scattered..........

BoJaNgLeS Has Came Back In Full Force........And He Is Angry.

Assist The Ranger Recruits In Taking Back The City....

           From BoJaNgLeS Full on Assault On The City.

In This 2D/3D Side-scroll Arcade Shooter/Beat em up Experience.
description_short: This Is The Conclusion To The Great "Urban Rangers Arcade" - Grab A Friend For This Co-Op Event. The Rangers, Thought They Had BoJaNgLeS Taken Down.............. But The Nightmare Had Only Began...... Bo Is Back, And Hes Calling The Rangers By Name. You Got His Attention...... Finish The Fight.
